title: CBC More Shells
description: An Addon of Create Big Cannons adding torpedos, bombs and more shell types
body:
This is an addon for Create Big Cannons includes:
- Torpedo and torpedo tube, similar as big cannon to use
- Projectile rack and bombs
- More shell types with variant in properties including SAP, HESH, Incendiary HE, APBC and Antiair HE
To use projectile rack:
- it requires at least one lock and one body to assemble, and minimum of 3 total length to support mechanical arm reload
- place it on a cannon mount and assemble like the cannon does
- right click on the lock after assembly to open, then you can load it with a bomb in hand
